title: Doctave Deployment
description: A deployment record for a Doctave documentation site, representing a build and publish operation triggered by a commit or manual action.

siteId.description: Identifier of the site this deployment belongs to.

commitSha.description: Git commit SHA that triggered the deployment.

branch.description: Git branch used for this deployment.

triggeredBy.description: User or system that triggered the deployment.

buildDuration.description: Duration of the build step in seconds.

deployDuration.description: Duration of the deploy step in seconds.

buildLog.description: URL to the build log for this deployment.

url.description: URL where the deployed documentation is accessible.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the deployment was created.
